'''Theen Fida''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Anx/Legends|Anx]] [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] who served the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] during the waning [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. The apprentice of [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Tsui Choi/Legends|Tsui Choi]], Padawan Fida was killed during the [[Yinchorri Uprising]] of [[33 BBY/Legends|33 BBY]].

==Biography==
A [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] [[Anx/Legends|Anx]], Theen Fida entered into the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] and was [[Jedi training/Legends|trained]] in the ways of [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] at the [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] [[Jedi Temple/Legends|Jedi Temple]]. Selected by the diminutive [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Tsui Choi/Legends|Tsui Choi]] to become his [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]], Theen Fida constructed a [[orange]]-bladed [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]] under his master's tutelage and learned much of the Force. When [[Yinchorri Uprising|peculiar activity]] erupted in the [[Yinchorri system]], the Master-Padawan team volunteered to travel to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Yitheeth]] to find the rumored [[Yinchorri command center]].<ref name="AOW1" />

[[File:TheDeathofTheenFida.jpg|thumb|left|Master Tsui Choi mourns the death of his Padawan.]]

Alongside his master and [[Jedi High Council/Legends|Jedi High Council]] members [[Adi Gallia/Legends|Adi Gallia]] and [[Eeth Koth/Legends|Eeth Koth]], Fida survived the crash of their [[Consular-class light cruiser/Legends|diplomatic cruiser]] after it was shot down over the watery world of Yitheeth. Swimming to shore, the Jedi commandeered a [[wavespeeder]] to enter the capital city in search of the command center. Determining that it was not on the world,<ref name="Jedi Council: Acts of War 2">[[Jedi Council: Acts of War 2|''Jedi Council: Acts of War'' 2]]</ref> the group rendezvoused with [[Master of the Order/Legends|Master of the Order]], [[Mace Windu/Legends|Mace Windu]] on the planet [[Yinchorr/Legends|Yinchorr]] and led an extraction mission to rescue the other Jedi trapped there. While defending their transport Padawan Fida, along with [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] [[Lilit Twoseas]], was struck down by the Yinchorri and died of an injury sustained to his abdomen. When the surviving Jedi made it to the cruiser, Fida's master carried his corpse aboard and it was transported back to the Coruscant Temple where it would be cremated per [[Jedi funeral/Legends|Jedi tradition]].<ref name="AOW4" />
